title: haloragis acutangula f. semiangulata
intro: Haloragis acutangula f. semiangulata, also known as the floating water-plantain, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Haloragaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its roots, stems, and leaves. The medicinal properties of Haloragis acutangula f. semiangulata are believed to provide various health benefits, including the reduction of fever, relief from rheumatism, and treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and can be taken as a tea or used topically in the form of creams or ointments.
